positive: A sophisticated, stylized celestial forest scene bathed in bioluminescent twilight. Depict intricate, stylized flora and fauna integrated with glowing constellations and deep-space nebulas. Central composition featuring glowing tree roots forming a mystical pathway, surrounded by crystalline mushroom clusters and gentle, ethereal fox spirits. Use a high-contrast, vaporwave aesthetic with dominant colors of deep indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, electric magenta, and glowing cyan. The style must be clean vector art combined with engraved linework, ensuring strong, isolated silhouettes suitable for direct apparel printing. Dramatic cinematic lighting, perfect symmetry, centered, full body composition, seamless repeat pattern potential.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, logo, out of frame, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, cartoon, amateur, grayscale, messy, dirty
